1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

    instructions="Read the provided user query about a financial or banking issue, and determine its core intent or issue category by assigning it to the most appropriate label from the following list: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds. \n\nCarefully analyze the user's text, focusing on the actual problem, request, or inquiry, rather than personal circumstances or irrelevant details. Ignore typographical errors or informal language that may be present. Then, respond with the single category label (from the list above) that best reflects the main financial or banking issue expressed in the text."
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
